intro_text.name: intro_text
intro_text.label: Hello. My name is ____________. I work with the COSME project team to understand the effects of the regenerative agriculture training. I will ask questions about your farming knowledge, attitudes, and practices. Your answers are confidential and will be combined with others. This is voluntary — you can skip any question or stop at any time. The interview takes about 20–25 minutes.

a3_crops.name: a3_crops
a3_crops.label: A3. Main crops currently grown (select up to 3)

a4_training.name: a4_training
a4_training.label: A4. Did you attend any regenerative agriculture training sessions?

a5_sessions.name: a5_sessions
a5_sessions.label: A5. Approximately how many sessions did you attend?

a6_training_date.name: a6_training_date
a6_training_date.label: A6. When did you first attend the training? (Month/Year)

a7_demo.name: a7_demo
a7_demo.label: A7. Have you participated in a demonstration plot activity?

a8_shared.name: a8_shared
a8_shared.label: A8. Have you trained/shared regenerative agriculture practices with others?

a9_numbers.name: a9_numbers
a9_numbers.label: A9. If YES in A8: Approximately how many people?

c_intro.name: c_intro
c_intro.label: RA: Now I will ask about your practices before and after training.

c2_before.name: c2_before
c2_before.label: C2. Soil fertility inputs before training

c2_after.name: c2_after
c2_after.label: C2. Soil fertility inputs after training

d1_intro.name: d1_intro
d1_intro.label: D1. For each practice, are you doing it now? (0 No, 1 Tried, 2 Regularly)

d1e.name: d1e
d1e.label: Cover crops / keeping soil covered in off-season

d2_intro.name: d2_intro
d2_intro.label: D2. Compared to before training, are you doing it more or less?

d3_intro.name: d3_intro
d3_intro.label: D3. Compared to before training, indicate changes:

e_intro.name: e_intro
e_intro.label: RA: I would like to now ask you about what you currently think of Regenerative Agriculture. Please state your level of agreement with the following statements. Scale: 1 Strongly disagree | 2 Disagree | 3 Neutral | 4 Agree | 5 Strongly agree

e1.name: e1
e1.label: Regenerative agriculture improves my farm productivity.

e2.name: e2
e2.label: The practices are worth the time and effort required.

e3.name: e3
e3.label: I feel confident I can apply regenerative practices correctly.

e4.name: e4
e4.label: I intend to continue using these practices in future seasons.

e5.name: e5
e5.label: I would recommend these practices to other farmers.

e6.name: e6
e6.label: These practices help my household adapt to climate change.

e7.name: e7
e7.label: The practices are affordable for me to maintain.

e8.name: e8
e8.label: I have enough support (knowledge/tools) to apply these practices.

e9.name: e9
e9.label: Women and men can benefit equally from these practices.

f_intro.name: f_intro
f_intro.label: RA: Select and rank the 3 most significant barriers (1=Most significant, 2=Second, 3=Third)

g_intro.name: g_intro
g_intro.label: RA: Complete only if you can observe the farm/plot or respondent shows evidence. Codes: 0 Not observed | 1 Partially observed | 2 Clearly observed

g1c.name: g1c
g1c.label: Evidence of crop diversity/intercropping or rotation planning

h1_continue.name: h1_continue
h1_continue.label: H1. Will you continue using regenerative agriculture practices after project support ends?

h2_recommend.name: h2_recommend
h2_recommend.label: H2. Would you recommend regenerative agriculture practices to other farmers?

h3_others.name: h3_others
h3_others.label: H3. In your group/community, are others adopting regenerative agriculture practices?
